evidence: "Perhaps I am a sucker for 'period' movies."
"This DVD Documentary-style tribute to general aviation..."
"The story of the man who came to America with no money............well, watch it........nothing not to like."
"The video transfer is actually very good."
"Wonderful attention to detail re period settings."
"The video transfer is actually very good."
"I think the A and E series is well written, well acted, beautiful photography."
"Ann Bancroft and Sir Anthony Hopkins and Judy Dench are wonderfully cast and are a pleasure to watch."
"masterpiece of photography, music.........written for this project, and a beautiful 'story' with gorgeous airplanes..."
"The Canadian scenery is a real star too."
"Loved the series as a kid....starting ...early 1950's. Still enjoy it."
"What a neat documentary. Worth watching on a couple of levels I think."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for documentaries and period pieces, appreciating high production quality and fast pacing. They value emotional resonance in their viewing experiences, often reflecting on nostalgic favorites.
